subject: Biology
title: Rewilding: Bringing Nature Back
description: A short lesson to help you apply Rewilding: Bringing Nature Back.

hook.text: What if we didn't just protect nature—but actively brought lost ecosystems back to life?

buildup.text: Rewilding reintroduces native species and restores natural processes to degraded landscapes.

discovery.text: In the Netherlands, the Oostvaardersplassen reserve let wild horses, deer, and birds reclaim land.

twist.text: Some projects propose bringing back woolly mammoths using gene editing to restore Arctic grasslands.

climax.text: Rewilding isn't about turning back time. It's about giving nature the freedom to heal itself.

punchline.text: Step back and let nature do what it does best.

quiz.question: What is the core idea of rewilding?
options: Reintroduce species and restore natural processes
Build more zoos and captive programs
